scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.prod: npm run build && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run start:server" "sleep 2 && npm run preview:client"
scripts.start:game: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run start:server" "npm run preview:client"
scripts.prod:free: npm run kill-port && npm run prod
